layoutRegions.name: consent-posture
layoutRegions.purpose: Readiness counts for active OAuth grants, bounded consents, owner reviews, and cleanup actions.

layoutRegions.name: delegated-scope-ledger
layoutRegions.purpose: OAuth grant inventory with app owner, delegated scopes, last use, and consent posture.

layoutRegions.name: review-and-revocation-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Stale access evidence, owner intent review, revocation windows, and rollback-safe consent cleanup.

components.name: GrantCard
components.purpose: Focusable OAuth grant card with app owner, delegated scopes, last use, and consent state.
interactions: state badge distinguishes approved, review, and revoke grants
scope strings wrap without horizontal overflow

components.name: ScopeFinding
components.purpose: Stale app access finding with source app, evidence, and review state.
interactions: focus state is visible for keyboard review

components.name: RevocationPlan
components.purpose: Consent cleanup window with rollback guard and owner review path.
interactions: rollback guidance wraps without horizontal overflow

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
